title: Seria Heavy Rain
lead: Seria is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of +3.11. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Seria is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 87% and low wind speed of 5.0 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The CDD value of 9.9 GG and zero HDD value indicate a high cooling demand due to the warm and wet conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
